---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 220px
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your@email.com
---

# Hi, I'm **Your Name** 👋

I'm a data science student passionate about turning raw data into meaningful insights. Currently studying at [Your University], I specialise in **Python**, **data visualisation**, and **machine learning**.

::: {.callout-note}
## 🎓 Currently
Final-year BSc in Data Science & Analytics — graduating May 2025.
:::

## What I Do

- 📊 **Data Analysis** — Exploratory analysis, statistical modelling, and storytelling with data
- 🤖 **Machine Learning** — Supervised and unsupervised learning with scikit-learn & PyTorch
- 🌐 **Web Publishing** — Building data-driven portfolios and dashboards
- 🐍 **Python Development** — Clean, well-documented, reproducible code

## Recent Projects

| Project | Tools | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Sales Forecasting | Python, Plotly | ✅ Complete |
| Customer Segmentation | scikit-learn, Pandas | ✅ Complete |
| NLP Sentiment Analyser | spaCy, NLTK | 🔄 In Progress |

Explore all my projects → [Projects page](projects/index.qmd)
